heading: Effect on other statutes and authorities
label: 10910 Effect on other statutes and authorities
text: Nothing in section 10908 or 10909 is intended to affect the traditional police powers of the State to require a rail carrier to comply with State and local environmental, public health, and public safety standards that are not unreasonably burdensome to interstate commerce and do not discriminate against rail carriers.
notes: Prior ProvisionsFor prior section 10910, see note set out under .section 10907 of this title
